Package order

package order
It includes everything order-unique. A client (registered or not) can browse and add store products to their cart, once added the desired products they can place an order (prior register needed) by paying the cart's price. Said order will be managed by the designated employees via the change of its status. There may be discounts applied to singular products, categories or even whole carts from a couple of options.
